summary: A high-impact anime web-thumbnail system with oversized reaction characters, bold yellow headline typography, hard black shadows, split-screen framing, a smaller glowing action insert, and clean cel-shaded illustration.
negative_prompt: source characters, shower scene, bathroom, towels, exposed-body reveal, sexualized anatomy, cleavage focus, underwear focus, exact source headline, watermark, username, QR code, logo, platform UI, realistic photo, 3D render, painterly concept art, low contrast text, small unreadable typography, dark moody palette, horror gore, explicit content, minors

variables.SUBJECT: main adult anime subject or paired reaction subjects
variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: surprised, amazed, competitive, or discovery-driven action
variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: object, product, tool, device, food, game cabinet, package, plant, or other prop
variables.LOCATION: clean indoor or semi-technical setting with simple background planes
variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: windows, panels, cabinets, screens, glow clouds, motion puffs, framed partitions, or soft blue depth elements
variables.SECONDARY_TEXT: optional small callout or repeated supporting label
variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: small yellow arrow, burst, glow puff, or outlined callout marker
variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: bright modern anime wardrobe, fully clothed, non-sexual, readable silhouette
variables.STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS: dense anime thumbnail, giant yellow-black headline, large cropped reaction characters, smaller central glowing reveal, crisp cel shading, blue/cyan background, warm accents, strong black outlines, high-contrast social thumbnail
variables.SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID: source characters, shower or bathroom setup, towel or exposed-body reveal, exact source headline, exact poses, sexualized framing, watermark, platform UI, logo, or original story premise

variables.SUBJECT: two adult anime food creators reacting to a glowing ramen automaton
variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: one chef gasps with chopsticks raised while a rival critic smirks in disbelief
variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: a compact ramen-making machine releasing turquoise steam and floating noodles
variables.LOCATION: clean late-night ramen counter with blue window panels and warm cabinets
variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: simple glass partitions, cyan glow, soft steam puffs, and a small yellow arrow pointing at the machine
variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: fully clothed modern chef jacket and sporty streetwear, non-sexual, readable silhouettes

example_cases.prompt_16x9: Create a 16:9 image in the "Bold Anime Reaction Thumbnail Style" visual style. Subject: two adult anime food creators reacting to a glowing ramen automaton. Action: one chef gasps with chopsticks raised while a rival critic smirks in disbelief. Prop/Product: a compact ramen-making machine releasing turquoise steam and floating noodles. Location: clean late-night ramen counter with blue window panels and warm cabinets. Background: simple glass partitions, cyan glow, soft steam puffs, and a small yellow arrow pointing at the machine. Main text: "NEW RECIPE". Secondary text: none. Accent symbol: small yellow arrow. Wardrobe/styling: fully clothed modern chef jacket and sporty streetwear, non-sexual, readable silhouettes. Style fidelity anchors: dense anime thumbnail, giant yellow-black headline, large cropped reaction characters, smaller central glowing reveal, crisp cel-shading, blue/cyan background, warm accents, strong black outlines, high-contrast social thumbnail. Source content to avoid: no shower, bathroom, towel, exposed body, source characters, original headline, sexualized anatomy, watermark, or original story premise. Use a wide video thumbnail. Put the giant yellow-black headline across the upper center. Crop two adult anime reaction characters on the far left and far right. Place the smaller central reveal between them, framed by doors, screens, or panels with cyan glow and a yellow arrow. Keep the three-zone hierarchy: headline first, faces second, reveal third. Generate as a 4K ultra-high-resolution raster image.

Put the giant yellow-black headline in the top quarter. Crop one adult anime reaction character large along the upper side edge and the second reaction character along the lower opposite edge. Place the smaller central reveal in the middle panel with cyan glow and a yellow arrow. Keep all text readable at phone size. Generate as a 4K ultra-high-resolution raster image.
